title: Advanced past modals
explanation:
Advanced past modals

Past modals express criticism, regret, deduction or unnecessary action about the past.

  • should have done = criticism / regret
  • needn't have done = unnecessary action
  • might/could have done = past possibility
  • must have done = strong past deduction

questions.text: You [*should have told|should tell|must tell] me earlier - I missed the deadline.
She [*needn't have bought|mustn't have bought|shouldn't buy] so much food; we had plenty already.
He [*must have forgotten|can't have forgotten|might forget] about the meeting - he never came.
They [*could have taken|could take|must take] the earlier train and avoided the delay.
I [*shouldn't have said|needn't have said|mustn't say] that in front of everyone.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The lights were on, so someone ____ home. | *must have been | can't have been | needn't have been
You ____ so much money on a jacket you never wear. | *needn't have spent | must have spent | should spend
She looks upset. She ____ the results already. | *might have heard | must hear | should hear
He ____ more carefully before signing the contract. | *should have read | needn't have read | can't have read
The document is missing. Someone [*must have removed|should remove|needn't remove] it.
questions.feedback: Strong deduction about a past action.

questions.text: We [*needn't have worried|shouldn't worry|mustn't worry] - the exam was easier than expected.
She [*could have become|could become|must become] a lawyer, but she chose teaching instead.
questions.feedback: Past possibility that did not happen.

questions.text: You [*should have checked|need have checked|must check] the address before sending the parcel.
He [*can't have seen|must have seen|should see] the warning sign - it was huge.
